docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF GUTIERREZ, SALVADOR AS TO DEFENDANT MASCINMENTO, ELI AN INDIVIDUAL JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
